name: live freshness gate --skip-fresh flag bypasses the gate and logs the bypass to the merkle audit log
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards/last-fetch compliance && printf '2026-04-01T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards/last-fetch/owasp-asvs.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --operation cite-standard --source owasp-asvs --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h --skip-fresh --audit-log compliance/audit.log 2>out.txt && grep -q 'gate=bypassed' out.txt && grep -q '"event":"skip-fresh-bypass"' compliance/audit.log && grep -q '"source":"owasp-asvs"' compliance/audit.log && echo ok 1>&2
